scripts.test: corepack pnpm run validate:suite && corepack pnpm run test:edge && corepack pnpm run test:rls && corepack pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck:elder: corepack pnpm --dir apps/elder exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck:grandchild: corepack pnpm --dir apps/grandchild exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:packages && corepack pnpm run typecheck:elder && corepack pnpm run typecheck:grandchild
scripts.test:e2e:browser:all: playwright test -c playwright.family.config.ts && playwright test -c playwright.iphone.config.ts
scripts.quality:check: corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run build:family
